title: CargoMetadataProjection
description: Deterministic projection of `cargo metadata --format-version 1` written to the bundle as `cargo_metadata.json` when boundary.toml enables `forbid_build_rs` or `forbid_proc_macros`. Verify-time replays the boundary checks against this cached projection so a build.rs / proc-macro added between generate and verify is caught (LLR-072). Sorted by `name` ascending so two hosts with the same git state produce byte-identical bundles (SYS-003).

targets.description: Targets the package declares. Empty array is legal (some workspace metadata-only crates).

kind.description: Target kind discriminator from cargo metadata. Common values: ["lib"], ["bin"], ["custom-build"] (build.rs), ["proc-macro"], ["test"], ["bench"], ["example"]. The verify-time recheck keys on `"custom-build"` and `"proc-macro"`.

links.description: Value of the package's `links` field (e.g. "libz") if it declares a native library binding, otherwise omitted/null. Surfaced informationally in `BOUNDARY_FORBIDDEN_BUILD_RS` diagnostics so auditors see native-FFI hints without re-running cargo metadata.
